mapper.select: SELECT br.*, u.username, u.nickname, b.title as book_title FROM barrages br LEFT JOIN users u ON br.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN books b ON br.book_id = b.id WHERE br.id = #{id}

SELECT br.*, u.username, u.nickname, b.title as book_title FROM barrages br LEFT JOIN users u ON br.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN books b ON br.book_id = b.id WHERE br.book_id = #{bookId} AND br.status = 1 ORDER BY br.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT br.*, u.username, u.nickname, b.title as book_title FROM barrages br LEFT JOIN users u ON br.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN books b ON br.book_id = b.id WHERE br.status = 1 ORDER BY br.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO barrages (user_id, book_id, content, color, position, status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bookId}, #{content}, #{color}, #{position}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE barrages SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
